ddls:
CREATE TABLE "conferences" (
  "conference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each conference */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the conference */,
  "webpage" TEXT /* Link to the conference webpage */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the conference */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the conference */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the conference */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the conference */,
  "organizer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the main organizer for the conference */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for conference inquiries */,
  "banner_image_url" TEXT /* URL to the conference banner image */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the conference location */,
  "registration_fee" TEXT /* Fee for attending the conference */,
  "abstract_submission_deadline" TEXT /* Deadline for abstract submissions */,
  "full_paper_submission_deadline" TEXT /* Deadline for full paper submissions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("conference_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "conference_tags" (
  "conference_id" INTEGER /* ID of the conference */,
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tag associated with the conference */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("conference_id", "tag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "submissions" (
  "submission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each submission */,
  "conference_id" INTEGER /* ID of the conference to which the paper is submitted */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the submitted paper */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author who submitted the paper */,
  "submission_date" TEXT /* Date the submission was made */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the submission (e.g., under review, accepted, rejected) */,
  "abstract" TEXT /* Abstract of the submitted paper */,
  "full_paper_url" TEXT /* URL to the full paper */,
  "keywords" TEXT /* Keywords associated with the submission */,
  "co_authors" TEXT /* List of co-authors */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("submission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_submissions_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES authors ("author_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_submissions_conference_id FOREIGN KEY ("conference_id") REFERENCES conferences ("conference_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "authors" (
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each author */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the author */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the author */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the author (e.g., university, company) */,
  "orcid_id" TEXT /* ORCID identifier for the author */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the author */,
  "profile_image_url" TEXT /* URL to the author's profile image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "participants" (
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participant */,
  "conference_id" INTEGER /* ID of the conference the participant is registered for */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the participant */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the participant */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date of registration for the conference */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the participant (e.g., attendee, speaker) */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the registration payment (e.g., paid, pending) */,
  "dietary_preferences" TEXT /* Dietary preferences for event catering */,
  "special_needs" TEXT /* Any special needs or accommodations */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_participants_conference_id FOREIGN KEY ("conference_id") REFERENCES conferences ("conference_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "submission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the submission being reviewed */,
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reviewer */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was assigned */,
  "review_comments" TEXT /* Comments provided by the reviewer */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given to the submission */,
  "recommendation" TEXT /* Final recommendation (e.g., accept, reject, revise) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_submission_id FOREIGN KEY ("submission_id") REFERENCES submissions ("submission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_reviewer_id FOREIGN KEY ("reviewer_id") REFERENCES reviewers ("reviewer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviewers" (
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reviewer */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the reviewer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the reviewer */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the reviewer */,
  "expertise" TEXT /* Areas of expertise of the reviewer */,
  "reviewer_bio" TEXT /* Brief biography of the reviewer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reviewer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the analytics record */,
  "conference_id" INTEGER /* ID of the conference */,
  "total_submissions" INTEGER /* Total number of submissions received */,
  "accepted_submissions" INTEGER /* Number of submissions accepted */,
  "total_participants" INTEGER /* Total number of participants registered */,
  "average_rating" TEXT /* Average rating of submissions */,
  "geographical_distribution" TEXT /* Summary of participant geographical distribution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_conference_id FOREIGN KEY ("conference_id") REFERENCES conferences ("conference_id")
)
column_names: ID of the main organizer for the conference
URL to the conference banner image
ID of the tag associated with the conference
ID of the conference to which the paper is submitted
ID of the author who submitted the paper
Current status of the submission (e.g., under review, accepted, rejected)
Affiliation of the author (e.g., university, company)
URL to the author's profile image
ID of the conference the participant is registered for
Date of registration for the conference
Role of the participant (e.g., attendee, speaker)
Status of the registration payment (e.g., paid, pending)
ID of the submission being reviewed
Areas of expertise of the reviewer
Unique identifier for the analytics record
